title: [InstCombine] Fix worklist management in select fold
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/select.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/select.ll
index 7583a75385a76..5687371b4e1dd 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/select.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/select.ll
@@ -3646,3 +3646,17 @@ loop:
 exit:
   ret i32 %rem
 }
+
+; (X == C) ? X : Y -> (X == C) ? C : Y
+; Fixed #77553
+define i32 @src_select_xxory_eq0_xorxy_y(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @src_select_xxory_eq0_xorxy_y(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[XOR0:%.*]] = icmp eq i32 [[X:%.*]], [[Y:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[COND:%.*]] = select i1 [[XOR0]], i32 0, i32 [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[COND]]
+;
+  %xor = xor i32 %x, %y
+  %xor0 = icmp eq i32 %xor, 0
+  %cond = select i1 %xor0, i32 %xor, i32 %y
+  ret i32 %cond
+}

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i32 @src_select_xxory_eq0_xorxy_y(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @src_select_xxory_eq0_xorxy_y(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[XOR0:%.*]] = icmp eq i32 [[X:%.*]], [[Y:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[COND:%.*]] = select i1 [[XOR0]], i32 0, i32 [[Y]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[COND]]
  %xor = xor i32 %x, %y
  %xor0 = icmp eq i32 %xor, 0
  %cond = select i1 %xor0, i32 %xor, i32 %y
  ret i32 %cond
}
tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i32 @src_select_xxory_eq0_xorxy_y(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %xor = xor i32 %x, %y
  %xor0 = icmp eq i32 %xor, 0
  %cond = select i1 %xor0, i32 %xor, i32 %y
  ret i32 %cond
}
